verdict.answer_first: B: starts with the direct prescription, "flexbox on the parent — three lines"; A also leads with Flexbox, but less compressed.
verdict.decisiveness: B: gives one default, "reach for flexbox first"; A weakens it with "Other good options" and a final follow-up CTA.
verdict.actionability: A: includes the missing operational condition, "parent needs a height" and gives "height: 100vh" plus HTML.
